text: Which of the following elements shall be part of a security drill on a ship?

options.text: Attacks from the seaward side while the ship is at berth
Handling minor oil spills on deck

explanation: Security drills must be realistic and reflect potential scenarios, such as an unauthorized boarding attempt from the seaward side. Other options involve maintenance or safety drills (oil spills/machinery), which are covered by different codes like MARPOL or SMS.
